title: Chainmail Armors Upgrate
description: You can fuse any armor with chainmail armor using the chainmail upgrade.
body: This datapack lets you fuse any armor piece with chainmail armor by using the chainmail upgrade. When you combine them, the durability and protection of the chainmail are added to your base armor, giving it extra strength and defense. This way, chainmail is no longer just decorative, but becomes a valuable material to enhance and reinforce your gear.
